issue_title: [CON-003] Add public protocol and deck-validation DTOs to @optcg/types
rendered_issue_body:
<!-- Generated by tools/spec_board_sync.ts from the approved story file. -->

_This issue is a synchronized projection of the approved story. Edit the story file, then rerun the sync tool instead of hand-editing authoritative sections here._

## Summary
Complete the shared protocol and deck-validation contract surface in @optcg/types so match-server, API, and client work use one source of truth for client envelopes, server messages, filtered PublicDecision payloads, and deck-validation I/O.

**Story ID:** `CON-003`  
**Spec Version:** `v6`  
**Type:** `implementation`  
**Area:** `contracts`  
**Priority:** `critical`  
**Status:** `done`

## Authoritative Spec References
- 15-implementation-kickoff.s005 (Step 1 - `@optcg/types`)
- 01-system-architecture.s004 (`@optcg/types`)
- 03-game-state-events-decisions.s013 (Targets/cards)
- 03-game-state-events-decisions.s016 (Action envelope inside the engine)
- 03-game-state-events-decisions.s017 (Canonical decision routing)
- 06-visibility-security.s004 (PlayerView shape)
- 07-match-server-protocol.s004 (Client action envelope)
- 07-match-server-protocol.s005 (Server action result)
- 07-match-server-protocol.s006 (Broadcast messages)
- 09-card-data-and-support-policy.s012 (Deck validation)

## Scope
- define and export the public protocol DTOs that are concretely specified for player-facing transport, including ClientActionEnvelope, ServerActionResult, rejection reasons, PublicTimerState, MatchResult, and player-safe ServerMessage variants
- define and export a filtered PublicDecision contract suitable for decisionRequired and PlayerView.pendingDecision without leaking hidden information
- define and export deck-validation input/output DTOs and related error, warning, and resolved-card shapes
- extend API-surface and contract regression tests so these DTOs remain stable in @optcg/types

## Out of Scope
- concrete SpectatorView DTOs or spectator-specific stateSync payloads
- implementing match-server transport behavior
- implementing deck-validation rules or persistence

## Dependencies
- CON-001 (#3)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] @optcg/types exports the player-facing protocol and deck-validation DTOs required by the kickoff and architecture docs
- [ ] decisionRequired and PlayerView.pendingDecision carry enough filtered data for a client to render choices and send respondToDecision without an out-of-band contract
- [ ] the exported DTO surface remains hidden-information safe for player-facing recipients

## Required Tests
- API-surface regression covering protocol and deck-validation exports
- contract test fixtures for ClientActionEnvelope, ServerMessage, and DeckValidationResult serialization
- regression test proving filtered PublicDecision payloads do not require unsafe casts or out-of-band fields

## Repo Rules
- must pass pnpm verify
- must preserve package boundary enforcement
- must not introduce hidden-information leakage

## Ambiguity Policy
fail_and_escalate
